nodes.name: SPEC_ORGANIZATION.md
nodes.summary: Master spec sequencing index for the Migration Oracle project, documenting the six spec IDs (000-005), their dependency graph, per-spec completion gates, SpecKit runbook locations, and working conventions such as OPTIONAL MATCH usage and artifact path ownership.

nodes.name: export-extract-populate-framework-pipeline.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive reference for the export-extract-populate-framework CLI command covering all seven pipeline phases (version resolution, upstream extraction, Jira enrichment, raw Markdown rendering, LLM filter-and-group, LLM entity extraction, and optional graph write), caching strategy, force flags, environment variables, and all nine supported frameworks.

nodes.name: extractor-research-report.md
nodes.summary: Research report documenting critical bugs and spec deviations found in the WildFly, Spring Boot, and Angular extractors, including silent omission of canonical migration sources, Jira enrichment defects, and pre-release filter gaps, with a prioritized action-item list.

nodes.name: graph-mcp-skills-and-paysafe-resolution.md
nodes.summary: Complete operational reference for the Neo4j/Memgraph knowledge graph schema, all MCP tool contracts (primary v2 and legacy servers), Cypher queries, skill resources, Paysafe internal dependency resolution via FindIt and GitLab, and environment variable configuration.

nodes.name: legacy_graph_structure.md
nodes.summary: Legacy Spring Boot version graph schema reference documenting the original node types (Version, MigrationRule, CommunityInsight, ApplicationProperty, Class, Dependency, OpenRewriteRecipe), their properties, and the full relationship catalog including AUTOMATED_BY edge schema with confidence scoring.

nodes.name: migration-oracle-redesign.md
nodes.summary: Canonical full-system redesign specification for the Migration Oracle, introducing MigrationStep and BreakingScope nodes, role-tagged entity references, MigrationContext for stateful execution tracking, a revised LLM extraction schema (MigrationEntitiesBatch), new MCP tools, and a four-loop agent harness.
